user.title: Add your VanMoof
user.description: Fetch the encryption key from your VanMoof account, or enter it manually.

menu_options.cloud: Log in with my VanMoof account (recommended)

cloud.title: VanMoof account
cloud.description: Log in with your VanMoof account. The encryption key and user key id are read from your account and never leave Home Assistant.

cloud_pick.title: Select your bike
cloud_pick.description: Pick the bike to add. Its key is taken from your account.

pick_device.title: Select the Bluetooth device
pick_device.description: Pick the nearby device that is this bike. If it isn't shown, wake it (press a button on the bike) and reopen this dialog, or type its MAC address manually.

manual.title: Select your VanMoof
manual.description: Pick your bike from the list. If it isn't shown, wake it (press a button on the bike) and reopen this dialog, or type its MAC address manually.

credentials.title: VanMoof credentials
credentials.description: Enter the encryption key and user key id for this bike. See the integration README for how to obtain them.

reauth_confirm.title: VanMoof authentication failed
reauth_confirm.description: The bike rejected the encryption key. Enter a corrected key and user key id.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check your VanMoof email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the VanMoof cloud. It may be down — try again, or use manual key entry.

abort.already_configured: This bike is already set up.

init.title: VanMoof options
init.description: How often to poll the bike over Bluetooth (in minutes). Lower is fresher but uses more radio and bike battery; locking/unlocking always connects immediately regardless of this.
